guide_eyebrow: Mexico City · Cheap Nutrition · Meal Prep
guide_title: Meal Prep Plan for Cheap, Nutritious Weight Gain
guide_intro: A practical weekend-cooking system for a tall, skinny, high-appetite person becoming independent in Mexico City. Built around cheap staples, reheatable meals, and your available appliances.
guide_goal_body: The goal is not to eat as little as possible. At your height and weight, the smarter goal is to eat cheaply enough while consistently gaining weight.
guide_core_body: Every meal should be built from simple modules. This makes food cheaper, easier to prep, and less boring.
guide_formula: Carb base + protein anchor + sauce + calorie booster + fruit/vegetable
guide_weekend_body: Cook modules, not 15 identical meals. Keep sauces and some bases separate so you can assemble different meals during the week.
guide_adjust_title: 9. How to adjust when weight is not going up
guide_disclaimer: This document is a practical planning guide, not medical advice. If you experience digestive issues, rapid weight loss, intense fatigue, or difficulty gaining weight despite eating enough, consider checking in with a healthcare professional.
